name: Autonomous Loop
description: Automatically sends a follow-up message after each agent reply to keep the agent working autonomously.

delayMs.description: Milliseconds to wait before sending the next message after a reply.

defaultMessage.description: Fallback message sent when no per-agent message is configured.

agents.description: Per-agent messages. Key = agentId, value = message string.

delayMs.label: Loop Delay (ms)
delayMs.help: How long to wait after a reply before sending the next task message. Default: 30000 (30 seconds).

defaultMessage.label: Default Task Message
defaultMessage.help: Message sent to any agent that doesn't have a custom message configured in the 'agents' map.

agents.label: Per-Agent Messages
agents.help: Map of agentId → custom task message. Takes priority over the default message. Example: { "david": "Read TASKS.md and pick the next task." }
